papers.title: A bionic robotic trunk with tensegrity-enabled elephant-comparable stiffness variability for assisted daily living
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70380-9Authors present a bionic robotic trunk with a cable-driven tensegrity skeleton, leveraging synergistic and antagonistic muscle-mimicking mechanisms to achieve rapid and large-range stiffness modulation comparable to that of an elephant trunk.
papers.authors: Jie Zhang, Chaozhong Yang, Hao Yang et al.
papers.innovation: 提出一种基于张拉整体骨架和仿生拮抗-协同驱动机制的仿生象鼻机器人，实现了刚度的快速大范围调节。
papers.breakthrough: 其刚度调节能力首次达到真实象鼻水平，远超现有软体或刚性机器人，为辅助生活应用提供了全新解决方案。

papers.title: High-quality metagenome assembly from nanopore reads with nanoMDBG
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-69760-yBenoit et al. present nanoMDBG, a scalable metagenome assembler for the latest ONT long reads, developed by adding error correction to metaMDBG. They demonstrate superior performance to the state-of-the-art and equivalent results to PacBio HiFi reads.
papers.authors: Gaëtan Benoit, Robert James, Sébastien Raguideau et al.
papers.innovation: 在元基因组组装器metaMDBG的基础上，首次为最新的牛津纳米孔长读长数据引入了纠错模块，开发出可扩展的组装工具nanoMDBG。
papers.breakthrough: 其组装质量首次达到与高精度PacBio HiFi数据相当的水平，性能显著优于现有最先进方法，解决了纳米孔数据错误率高导致组装质量不佳的核心难题。

papers.title: North American ice sheet persistence into past interglacials should inform future projections
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70032-ySea level projections are shaped by the tenet that the North American Ice Sheet (NAIS) melted prior to past interglacial sea level peaks. This piece argues that NAIS persisted into past interglacials, which amplifies Antarctic sensitivity to warming.
papers.authors: Roger C. Creel, Robert E. Kopp, Andrea Dutton et al.
papers.innovation: 挑战了北美冰盖在以往间冰期峰值前已完全融化的主流观点，提出其持续存在的新证据。
papers.breakthrough: 该发现修正了海平面预测的关键前提，并揭示了南极冰盖对变暖的敏感性比此前认知更高。

papers.title: Structural insights into insect-selective sodium channel toxins drive AI-enhanced biopesticide design
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70190-zThe authors reveal how two insect-selective animal peptide toxins engage distinct sites on an insect sodium channel to disrupt fast inactivation and leverage these structural insights to AI-design a more potent toxin for biopesticide development.
papers.authors: Heng Jiang, Ruibo Gao, Huiqin Xu et al.
papers.innovation: 首次解析了两种昆虫选择性肽毒素与昆虫钠通道不同位点结合的结构，并利用该结构信息通过AI设计出更强效的毒素。
papers.breakthrough: 将结构生物学发现直接转化为AI驱动的理性设计，实现了生物农药效力的定向提升，超越了传统基于经验或随机筛选的优化方法。

papers.title: USP7 deubiquitinase stabilizes FAN1 to support DNA crosslink repair and suppress CAG repeat expansion
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70051-9FAN1 is a DNA repair enzyme that maintains genome stability and limits repeat expansions linked to Huntington’s disease. Here, the authors show that USP7 stabilizes FAN1, supporting DNA repair, protecting cells from DNA damage, and slowing CAG repeat expansion.
papers.authors: Giulio Collotta, Marco Gatti, Irina-Maria Ungureanu et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示了去泛素化酶USP7通过稳定DNA修复酶FAN1，从而调控DNA链间交联修复和抑制亨廷顿病相关CAG重复序列扩展的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 该研究将USP7-FAN1轴确立为连接蛋白质稳态、DNA修复与神经退行性疾病中动态突变过程的关键枢纽，为干预疾病进展提供了全新靶点。

papers.title: Liquid metal universal grippers for gentle, adaptable, multiscale manipulation
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70313-6Robotic grippers struggle to handle fragile and varied objects across environments. Here, the authors introduce a liquid metal gripper that adapts its shape and stiffness for gentle, multiscale grasping and active release.
papers.authors: Xuanhan Chen, Mingkui Zhang, Lu Cao et al.
papers.innovation: 提出一种基于液态金属的通用夹持器，其能通过主动调控形状与刚度，实现对脆弱、多尺度物体的自适应抓取与主动释放。
papers.breakthrough: 解决了传统夹持器难以兼顾轻柔抓取、强适应性及主动释放的难题，在单一系统中实现了刚柔可变与多尺度操控的性能突破。

papers.title: Global implications of uncertainty in China’s climate policy delivery
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70400-8Stronger climate policy delivery in China can partly offset weak mitigation elsewhere in the medium term, but achieving Paris goals ultimately requires sustained global action. China’s policy delivery uncertainty alone could shift cumulative emissions by ~500 GtCO₂ by 2100 (~0.17 °C warming).
papers.authors: Dan Zhang, Steve Pye, Jim Watson et al.
papers.innovation: 首次量化了中国气候政策执行的不确定性对全球累积碳排放和温升的独立影响，揭示了其作为关键变量的全球意义。
papers.breakthrough: 相比以往聚焦于政策目标的研究，该工作将“政策执行”这一过程性不确定因素纳入全球气候模型，并量化出其高达500 GtCO₂的排放影响，提供了更精细的风险评估维度。

papers.title: Synergistic aluminum dual-atom sites and nickel nanoclusters for acetylene selective hydrogenation
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70323-4Catalysts combining different active sites can enhance chemical reactions by activating multiple steps simultaneously. Herein, aluminum dual-atom sites paired with nickel nanoclusters enable efficient, selective acetylene hydrogenation under mild conditions.
papers.authors: Yanan Liu, He Yu, Mengjiao Li et al.
papers.innovation: 首次构建了铝双原子位点与镍纳米团簇协同催化的新型双位点催化剂体系。
papers.breakthrough: 该催化剂在温和条件下实现了乙炔高效选择性加氢，其活性和选择性均显著超越传统单金属或合金催化剂。

papers.title: Author Correction: Programmable 200 GOPS Hopfield-inspired photonic Ising machine
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10305-0Author Correction: Programmable 200 GOPS Hopfield-inspired photonic Ising machine
papers.authors: Nayem Al-Kayed, Charles St-Arnault, Hugh Morison et al.
papers.innovation: 首次实现了可编程、基于霍普菲尔德网络启发的光子伊辛机，其运算速度达到200 GOPS。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统电子计算和早期光计算方案，该机器在解决组合优化问题时的能效和速度实现了数量级提升。

papers.title: The first ‘AI societies’ are taking shape: how human-like are they?
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00070-5Scientists are studying forms of ‘social’ interactions between artificial-intelligence agents. Will they find a fresh form of sociology, or merely a sophisticated mime act?
papers.authors: Jenna Ahart
papers.innovation: 首次将社会学实验方法系统应用于研究AI智能体间的“社会性”互动，以探索其是否形成新型社会结构。
papers.breakthrough: 超越了传统AI行为模拟，通过可控实验环境为研究“人工社会”的涌现现象提供了全新且可量化的实证研究范式。

papers.title: These brain cells clear proteins that contribute to Alzheimer’s
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00747-xWhen specialized cells called tanycytes stop working, disease-causing tau proteins build up in the brain.

papers.breakthrough: 为阿尔茨海默病提供了全新的细胞靶点，突破了传统仅关注神经元和胶质细胞清除机制的局限。

papers.title: The Epstein scandal is a wake-up call — new rules are needed on links with rich donors
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00698-3A systemic failure of oversight allowed the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein to curry favour with academia. Stronger governance is urgently needed.
papers.authors: Arthur Caplan
papers.innovation: 将学术伦理监督的焦点从个体失范转向系统性治理失灵，并提出建立针对富豪捐赠者背景审查的刚性制度框架。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统上依赖机构自律和事后追责的软性伦理指南，首次在顶级学术期刊倡导建立强制性的、预防性的外部审查与利益隔离机制。

papers.title: Identical twins on trial: can DNA testing tell them apart?
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00521-zIn a French criminal trial, conventional DNA analysis couldn’t distinguish between twin brothers, but emerging scientific methods could help in such cases.
papers.authors: Rachel Fieldhouse
papers.innovation: 将新兴DNA分析技术（如表观遗传学或体细胞突变检测）应用于区分同卵双胞胎，突破了传统DNA指纹技术的局限。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统DNA分析无法区分同卵双胞胎，该方法首次在真实刑案中提供了可行的个体识别解决方案，显著提升了法医学的个体甄别能力。

papers.title: Inside Mexico’s stem-cell industry
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00533-9Researchers in the country are calling for stronger regulation of treatments that many people make long journeys to receive.

papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往仅关注疗法本身的局限，从跨国医疗旅游与监管缺失的交叉视角，为全球干细胞治疗乱象提供了区域性实证与治理新思路。

papers.title: How AI is being used in war — and what’s next
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00710-wThe conflict in Iran is highlighting the use of artificial intelligence in warfare.

papers.breakthrough: 相比以往的理论推演，该研究通过真实战场数据，实证分析了AI军事应用的演进路径与颠覆性作战范式转变。

papers.title: Do obesity drugs treat addiction? Huge study hints at their promise
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00734-2Study of 600,000 US military veterans shows that those who took anti-obesity medications were less likely to develop some complications of substance-use disorders.

papers.breakthrough: 研究样本量达60万，远超同类研究，为“老药新用”治疗成瘾提供了迄今为止最有力的流行病学证据。

papers.title: First ‘half Möbius’ carbon chain wows chemists

papers.title: High-rise transistors can be used to build space-saving circuits
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00249-wLogical circuits have been built from nanosheet stacks of various transistors, which could make electronic devices faster and more compact.

papers.breakthrough: 该技术突破了平面晶体管集成度的物理极限，能在不增加芯片面积的前提下显著提升电路性能和紧凑性。

papers.title: How these koalas bounced back from the brink of extinction
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00746-yTracking DNA recombination offers hope for other species that have lost genetic diversity.

papers.breakthrough: 为其他濒危物种的遗传拯救提供了可追踪、可验证的分子水平新策略，超越了传统种群统计的保护生物学方法。

papers.title: Women in science are not a ‘problem to be fixed’
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 05 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00546-4Cordelia Fine wrote Patriarchy Inc to challenge two false visions of gender equality at work and offer a fairer future for the female workforce.

papers.breakthrough: 突破了将女性视为“待解决问题”的主流叙事框架，为职场性别平等提供了全新的结构性分析视角。

papers.title: Can a wealthy family change the course of a deadly brain disease?

papers.breakthrough: 相比传统科研资助，展示了私人资本在推动高风险、长周期神经退行性疾病研究中的独特优势与挑战。

papers.title: Structural modeling reveals phage proteins that manipulate bacterial immune signaling | Science
papers.summary: Immune systems in animals, plants, and bacteria often rely on intracellular nucleotide signaling, which viruses can block by sequestering or degrading these signals. We identified structural and biophysical traits shared by diverse viral antidefense ...
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 首次通过结构建模揭示了多种噬菌体蛋白通过共享的结构基序，劫持细菌免疫信号分子以逃逸防御的通用机制。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往对单一病毒-宿主互作的认识，从结构层面系统阐明了跨病毒家族的广谱性免疫逃逸策略。

papers.title: Climate change will increase forest disturbances in Europe throughout the 21st century | Science
papers.summary: Wildfires, insect outbreaks, and storms cause large pulses of tree mortality. Climate change amplifies these forest disturbances, yet their future magnitude and extent remain uncertain. Here, we simulated future forest disturbance regimes at 100-meter ...

papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往单一、粗尺度研究的局限，提供了前所未有的时空精细度与多扰动耦合分析，显著提升了预测的可靠性与区域针对性。

papers.title: Single intramuscular injection of self-amplifying RNA of Nppa to treat myocardial infarction | Science
papers.summary: Self-amplifying RNA (saRNA) enables sustained protein expression from a single administration. In this study, we developed an intramuscular saRNA-lipid nanoparticle (saNppa-LNP) therapy encoding natriuretic peptide type A (Nppa) for cardioprotection. A ...

papers.breakthrough: 相比传统蛋白或多肽疗法，该技术单次注射即可实现持续数周的蛋白表达，显著提升了治疗便捷性与药效持久性。

papers.title: Democratizing climate change mitigation pathways using modernized stabilization wedges | Science
papers.summary: Mitigating climate change requires broad societal buy-in. Integrated assessment models (IAMs) produce cost-optimal pathways, but these are complex and not easily customized to reflect individuals’ preferences. Twenty years ago, the stabilization wedge ...
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 将经典的“稳定楔”概念现代化，开发了一个交互式开源工具，允许非专家用户根据个人偏好定制和探索气候减缓路径。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统综合评估模型复杂、不透明的局限，首次实现了气候路径的民主化、可视化定制，极大降低了公众参与气候决策的门槛。

papers.title: Global majority countries must embed critical minerals into AI governance | Science
papers.summary: Over the past decade, an increasing number of Global Majority countries—broadly characterized as economically developing countries in Africa, the Caribbean, Asia, Latin America, the Middle East, and Oceania—have introduced national artificial intelligence (AI) strategies. However, many of these frameworks overlook a critical dimension of AI governance: the strategic importance of critical minerals. As geopolitical tensions intensify around access to computing infrastructure, Global Majority countries must recognize that their mineral reserves represent leverage points for transforming their respective positions in the global AI value chain.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 首次将关键矿产的战略价值与全球南方国家的AI治理框架相结合，提出以矿产资源为杠杆重塑全球AI价值链的新视角。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了现有AI治理研究多聚焦于算法伦理与数据主权的局限，将地缘政治与供应链安全引入讨论，为资源国提供了切实的议价策略。

papers.title: Escaping bottlenecks: The demographic path to genetic recovery in koalas (Phascolarctos cinereus) | Science
papers.summary: Population bottlenecks can lead to evolutionary dead ends by eroding genetic diversity and intensifying inbreeding. Although theory predicts possible escape routes, direct observations of this process are rare. Using whole-genome data from 418 koalas, we ...
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 首次利用大规模全基因组数据，直接观测并证实了考拉种群在经历瓶颈后，通过种群扩张实现遗传恢复的理论路径。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往研究多依赖理论模拟或间接证据的局限，为濒危物种的遗传拯救提供了首个实证案例和关键数据支持。

papers.breakthrough: 作为信息聚合平台，其突破性在于高效筛选并呈现跨学科前沿进展，而非单一技术突破。

papers.title: Poland: No country for PhD researchers | Science
papers.summary: US universities are facing a political backlash (1), which has intensified under the Trump administration (2, 3). In response, the European Union (EU) launched the “Choose Europe for Science” initiative to safeguard academic freedoms and attract scholar talent, particularly from the US (4, 5). However, the initiative overlooks researchers pursuing PhDs. Marginalization of PhD researchers persists in EU countries such as Poland. Hence, the EU must provide stability for its next generation of knowledge producers.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 首次将欧盟“选择欧洲科学”倡议的盲区聚焦于博士生群体，并以波兰为例，揭示了欧盟在吸引高端人才时对本土后备科研力量的结构性忽视。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往仅关注教授或资深学者流动的宏观人才政策讨论，将批判视角下沉至科研生态的基础层，指出了人才战略中“重引进、轻培养”的根本性矛盾。

papers.title: Ease the struggle of young researchers | Science
papers.summary: Young scientists face increasingly uncertain conditions (1), leaving many to wonder whether a scientific career is worth it (2). Between 2000 and 2023, the global research workforce expanded rapidly, but funding growth has lagged behind (3), leading to declining success rates and prolonged instability early in scientific careers. Moreover, increased funding often disproportionately benefits senior researchers, leaving younger colleagues with limited independence (4). Only structural reforms can improve the career outlook for young scientists.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 本文创新性地将全球科研人员规模扩张与经费增长滞后进行量化关联，揭示了青年科研人员职业困境的结构性根源。
papers.breakthrough: 相比以往定性讨论，本文基于2000-2023年数据首次系统论证了经费分配机制对青年学者独立性的压制效应，为结构性改革提供了实证依据。

papers.title: Support communities to conserve the Third Pole | Science

papers.title: Ambient-air fabrication of wide-band-gap perovskites via a dual-functional polymer for all-perovskite tandem solar modules

papers.breakthrough: 相比传统试错法，该方法将添加剂筛选效率提升一个数量级，并成功指导合成出使电池在60°C/4.5V下循环稳定性提升300%的新型添加剂。

papers.innovation: 首次将电致变色与人工突触融合，构建出兼具光学显示和神经形态计算功能的时空双加密显示器件。
papers.breakthrough: 实现了信息在空间（颜色）和时间（脉冲历史）两个维度的同步加密与动态显示，突破了传统静态或单一维度加密的局限。

papers.innovation: 首次将硫掺杂策略应用于钒氧化物正极材料，以调控其电子结构和层间距，提升锌离子电池性能。
papers.breakthrough: 该材料实现了极高的比容量（0.1 A g⁻¹下达485 mAh g⁻¹）和超长循环稳定性（5 A g⁻¹下循环2000次容量保持率91.5%），性能远超未掺杂材料及多数报道的钒基正极。
